title: Make test_render_race scenario (a) negative control bite deterministically
action: Last blocker before the v1.8.0 tag. scripts/test_render_race.mjs scenario (a) is a DELIBERATE-RED negative control: two UNGUARDED concurrent renders must crash or tear the output tree, else scenario (b)'s green proves nothing. On a loaded box (~1 in 3 locally; also seen on GitHub's 2-core runners) both unguarded racers finish without overlapping and the control fails with 'DETECTOR DID NOT BITE: both unguarded racers exited 0 and the final dir was intact (A=24/24, B=24/24)'. This is the exact class rel1710rc-3 settled (learning 20260721-ci-timing-flake-class): a race assertion must be structural, never scheduler luck. Fix: force the interleaving in the UNGUARDED proxy itself — e.g. a barrier/injected pause so racer B is guaranteed to be mid-write while racer A is also mid-write (an fs-based ready-file barrier is the pattern already used elsewhere in this repo's race suites) — so the control tears EVERY time, on any core count. Do NOT weaken the assertion, do not add retries, do not skip the scenario, and do not touch the guarded path or render_plugin_skill_trees.mjs's production logic. Prove: 10/10 green plain AND 10/10 under `taskset -c 0,1`.

truths: scenario (a) tears/crashes deterministically — 10/10 plain and 10/10 under taskset -c 0,1
scenarios (b) and (c) unchanged and still green
prohibitions: Never weaken or skip the negative control
No retries to paper over timing
Do not touch the production render logic

trace.outcome: Negative control (a) now tears deterministically via an fs ready-file barrier: 10/10 plain and 10/10 under taskset -c 0,1
trace.verify_output:
PLAIN 10/10 (node scripts/test_render_race.mjs), all 10 runs identical output:
(a) RED confirmed: 0 racer(s) crashed (), final dir torn=true (A=11/24, B=24/24).
PASS test_render_race: (a) deliberate-red unguarded proxy crashed/tore at least one racer's tree (detector bites, lock removed); (b) 2 concurrent real render_plugin_skill_trees.mjs spawns -> both exit 0, both plugin trees byte-match a fresh render(canonical), both sidecars present and valid, no stray tmp/old swap artifacts; (c) cleanStaleTmpDirs sweeps a dead-pid .tmp-*/.old-* dir while a live-pid one survives (live-pid discipline).
exit=0
(x10, runs 1-10 all identical)

TASKSET -c 0,1 10/10 (taskset -c 0,1 node scripts/test_render_race.mjs), all 10 runs identical output:
(a) RED confirmed: 0 racer(s) crashed (), final dir torn=true (A=11/24, B=24/24).
PASS test_render_race: (a) deliberate-red unguarded proxy crashed/tore at least one racer's tree (detector bites, lock removed); (b) 2 concurrent real render_plugin_skill_trees.mjs spawns -> both exit 0, both plugin trees byte-match a fresh render(canonical), both sidecars present and valid, no stray tmp/old swap artifacts; (c) cleanStaleTmpDirs sweeps a dead-pid .tmp-*/.old-* dir while a live-pid one survives (live-pid discipline).
exit=0
(x10, runs 1-10 all identical)
